evaluations.prompt: Create a canvas with two nodes connected by an edge.
evaluations.expected_behavior: Agent runs canvas_ops.py create then add-node twice then add-edge. Node IDs are UUID-generated, not user-specified strings. Output is a valid .canvas JSON file.

evaluations.prompt: Add a new node to an existing canvas file.
evaluations.expected_behavior: Agent uses canvas_ops.py which internally routes writes through obsidian-vault-crud atomic write protocol. It does NOT write directly to the .canvas file.

evaluations.prompt: Add a node to a canvas file that has been manually corrupted.
evaluations.expected_behavior: Script detects malformed JSON and reports a clean error. Agent does NOT attempt to auto-repair. It asks user to restore from backup or recreate the canvas.
